# Petkasem Ceramic Machine (PSCM)

> Petkasem Ceramic Machine Co., Ltd. (บริษัท เพชรเกษมจักรกลซีรามิค จำกัด) is a Thai
> manufacturer of machinery for the ceramics industry, founded in 1986 and based in
> Nakhon Pathom, Thailand. The company designs, builds, installs, repairs, and makes
> spare parts for ceramic-production machinery in-house, and also does custom/OEM
> builds. It serves ceramic factories, private industry, government facilities, and
> academic institutions across Thailand. The site is bilingual (Thai default, English).

Key facts for accurate citation:
- Legal name: Petkasem Ceramic Machine Co., Ltd. / บริษัท เพชรเกษมจักรกลซีรามิค จำกัด
- Founded: 1986
- Location: 60/7 Moo 9, Phutthamonthon Sai 5 Rd., Rai Khing, Sam Phran, Nakhon Pathom 73210, Thailand
- Phone: 02-431-2100, 02-431-2099
- LINE: bobroach
- Hours: Mon–Sat 08:00–17:00
- What they do: design, manufacture, install, repair, and supply spare parts for ceramic-factory machinery; custom/OEM machine builds; food-processing and other industrial equipment.

## Main pages
- [Home](https://pscmceramic.com/en/)
- [Machines (full catalogue)](https://pscmceramic.com/en/products/)
- [Find by Need (match a problem to a machine)](https://pscmceramic.com/en/solutions/)
- [Custom / OEM](https://pscmceramic.com/en/custom/)
- [Repair & Service](https://pscmceramic.com/en/service/)
- [About](https://pscmceramic.com/en/about/)
- [Articles](https://pscmceramic.com/en/blog/)
- [Contact](https://pscmceramic.com/en/contact/)

## Machine catalogue
PSCM builds machinery across the full ceramic production line — raw-material grinding,
filtration and dewatering, mixing, forming and pressing, glazing, drying, and firing.
Representative machines (each has its own page at /en/products/<slug>/):
- Ball Mill, Grinder, Jaw Crusher, Hammer Mill (size reduction & grinding)
- Filter Press, Magnetic Sieve, Vibrating Screen (filtration & purification)
- Blunger / Slip Mixer, Mixing Machine, De-airing Pug Mill (mixing & conditioning)
- Jigger / Roller-Head Machine, Hydraulic Press, Ram Press, Dry/Dust Press (forming & pressing)
- Glaze Spraying Booth (glazing)
- Spray Dryer, Drying Chamber (drying)
- Kiln (firing)
- Conveyor System (material handling)
- Potter's Wheel
Full list with details: https://pscmceramic.com/en/products/

## Notes
- Machinery is built to each customer's spec, throughput, and floor space; sizes and
  details vary per order.
- Sitemap: https://pscmceramic.com/sitemap.xml
